h4ff105fcgbe29g4145gaa23gad2e47b4f5c9: This is madness, Kagha. She's just a...
hc644b38eg3739g429cg9b2dg693c6c2047a7: A what, Rath? A thief? A poison? A threat?

h494ccdf8g2036g4c7ag85a6g6f4ce64046d4: She eats our food, drinks our water. Then steals our most holy Idol in thanks!
h638411ffg4186g4a91gb2aagf12697841571: Imprison her? She's just a child.

hab57f3e2g32d6g4884g80e2gd6b148412395: Fair words. Child, take to the others word of my grace. Ssifisv - Teela, to me.

h807f76b8ga99dg4f49gb6f3g51c8cef0fb70: I hear the Treefather's spirit in your words.

h35afd76cgad61g450cg9fdegbf4480c332ee: Yes. She is more valuable out there than in here. Ssifisv - Teela, to me.
